operations.summary: List GitHub Projects using a fixed GraphQL query.

graphql.document: query ListProjects($owner: String!, $first: Int!, $after: String) { organization(login: $owner) { projectsV2(first: $first, after: $after) { nodes { id number title url closed updatedAt } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } } }

operations.summary: Delete an issue using a fixed GraphQL mutation.
operations.approval: destructive reverse ETL writes require plan, preview, approval, execute

graphql.document: mutation DeleteIssue($issueId: ID!) { deleteIssue(input: { issueId: $issueId }) { clientMutationId } }

operations.summary: Download release assets with a bounded file-transfer policy.
operations.approval: filesystem writes require an explicit destination policy

operations.summary: Clone a repository through a restricted local Git workflow.
operations.approval: local filesystem and git mutations require explicit approval
